question: What text overlay is visible when the person is holding a grey mechanical part in the workshop? A. DRAIN FLUIDS B. SOAK NEW LIFTERS IN 10W30 SYNTHETIC C. HOW TO Swap a CAMSHAFT D. REMOVE ENGINE ACCESSORIES
What number appears in red script on the intro graphic overlay with the truck?
What color is the long-sleeved shirt worn by the person working on the engine? A. Red B. Dark blue C. Yellow D. Grey
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A cartoon cat drives a beige truck in an overlay. A person wearing a dark blue shirt opens a black COMP box and soaks metal lifters in oil. Black fluid flows from a red oil pan into a metal bucket below the engine. The person works on a red engine block with silver pulleys attached.

question: How many stamped numbers are visible on the metallic engine gear?

Which of the previously seen entities is back on screen? A. <cylindrical metal lifter, silver and shiny> B. <brass-colored metal puller tool with threaded rods> C. <yellow flexible tube inserted in engine> D. <rubber mallet with black head and wooden handle>
Where is the text 'SAM'S TRUCKS' displayed during the introduction? A. On the wooden workbench B. At the bottom of the screen C. Above the metal bucket D. Inside the engine block
What is the position of the large red container relative to the metal bucket? A. Below B. On C. Above D. Inside
What action is the person wearing a black long-sleeved shirt performing on the red engine block?
Describe the initial preparation steps shown in the video, including handling the new parts and managing the engine fluids.
canonical_answer: At 8s, hands open a black COMP box on a wooden surface; at 10s, a metal lifter is dipped into brown liquid in a tray; at 12s, a yellow tube is placed into the red engine block; at 16s, black fluid drains from the oil pan into a dirty metal bucket.

question: Has the person wearing a dark blue long-sleeved shirt started sliding the metallic camshaft out of the red engine block yet?

What specific action is the person performing in this segment? A. Draining black fluid from the red oil pan into a metal bucket B. Removing pushrods from the red engine block using a tool C. Opening the lid of a blue dumpster to discard the part D. Wiping the red engine block surface with a white cleaning cloth

How has the white text overlay instruction changed from the scene with the oil tray to the final scene with the pulley? A. From SOAK NEW LIFTERS to REMOVE ENGINE ACCESSORIES B. From DRAIN FLUIDS to INSTALL CAMSHAFT C. From REMOVE ENGINE ACCESSORIES to SOAK NEW LIFTERS D. From CHANGE OIL to DRAIN FLUIDS
The on-screen text mentions taking out the cam while removing lifters - what action is performed with the camshaft later in the process?
canonical_answer: The person gently installs the lubricated camshaft into the red engine block.

question: Has the step 'remove distributor assembly' been done by now?

What is about to happen with the red container positioned above the metal bucket? A. It will be bolted to the engine block B. It will drain fluid into the bucket C. It will be filled with water D. It will be cleaned with a rag

Given what is visible so far, could the person install the new rocker nuts on the cylinder head? A. Yes — bag of nuts and cylinder head are both visible B. No — no cylinder head visible in the scene C. No — bag of rocker nuts is not present D. No — cylinder head is fully covered by a casing
After the person inserts the metallic camshaft into the red engine block, where is the camshaft located? A. Inside the engine block B. In the person's hand C. On the red stand D. In the plastic bag
